code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      1
    end
    product = product * n
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("product=#{product}")
end
